title: alsophila appendiculata
intro: Alsophila appendiculata, also known as the New Zealand tree fern, is a species of tree fern native to New Zealand. It has been used in traditional Maori medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been attributed to its saponin and flavonoid compounds. The health benefits of Alsophila appendiculata include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and provide antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of Alsophila appendiculata can be made from its leaves and rhizomes, which can be used to make teas, infusions, and topical applications, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
